steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The function is $h(x)=x+200$. To find $h(50)$, replace $x$ with $50$: $$h(50)=50+200.$$

steps.title: Compute and compare
steps.content: $50+200=250$, so $h(50)=250$. Choice A is the starting $200$ without adding the input, while choices C and D come from using the wrong operation. Choice B is correct.
